title: Dealer Interest
description: Level D data — records third-party interest in estate assets (art dealers, property investors, collectors). Privacy-controlled. Managed via proxy authorisation.

InterestedParty.description: A third party expressing interest in purchasing or acquiring estate assets.

personId.description: Reference to a Person.id if the interested party is an individual in the people array.

name.description: Name of the interested party — individual or organisation.

type.$comment: art_dealer: professional art dealer. antique_dealer: dealer in antiques and collectibles. property_investor: individual or company interested in purchasing property. auction_house: auction house (Christie's, Sotheby's, Bonhams). gallery: art gallery interested in acquiring works. private_collector: individual collector. museum: museum interested in acquisition or donation. institution: academic or cultural institution. charity: charitable organisation interested in a bequest or donation. developer: property developer. fund_manager: investment fund manager. family_office: family office managing wealth. estate_agent: estate agent or realtor. solicitor_firm: law firm acting for a buyer. other: any other type of interested party.

contactDetails.description: Contact details for the interested party.

AssetInterestItem.description: A specific asset or property that the interested party wants to acquire.

interestLevel.$comment: exploratory: casual interest, no commitment. moderate: genuine interest, may proceed if terms are right. strong: actively pursuing acquisition. committed: firm intent to acquire, willing to formalise.
interestLevel.description: How strong the interested party's intent is.

CollectionInterest.description: Interest in a collection of assets or properties as a whole, rather than individual items.

assetIds.description: Asset IDs that make up this collection.

propertyIds.description: Property IDs that make up this collection.

notes.description: Additional notes about the collection interest.
examples: Interested in acquiring the complete collection, not individual pieces

OfferDetails.description: Details of a specific offer made by the interested party.

amount.description: The offer amount in minor currency units.

documentRef.description: Reference to the document containing the offer.

id.description: Unique identifier for this dealer interest record within the INHERIT document.

interestedParty.description: The third party expressing interest in estate assets.

assets.description: Specific assets or properties the interested party wants to acquire.

collection.description: Interest in a collection of assets as a whole.

offerStatus.$comment: standing_interest: general interest registered, no specific offer. verbal_offer: informal verbal offer made. written_offer: formal written offer submitted. formal_valuation: independent valuation commissioned as part of negotiation. conditional_offer: offer subject to conditions. accepted: offer accepted by the testator or executor. declined: offer declined. expired: offer has passed its validity date. withdrawn: offer withdrawn by the interested party.
offerStatus.description: Current status of the offer or expression of interest.

offerDetails.description: Details of a specific offer, if one has been made.

testatorDisposition.$comment: willing_to_sell: testator is open to selling. prefer_not_to_sell: testator would rather not sell but hasn't ruled it out. hold_for_executor: testator defers to executor's judgement after death. deferred_to_family: decision deferred to family. promised_to_institution: item informally promised to a museum, gallery, or institution. undecided: testator has not expressed a preference.
testatorDisposition.description: The testator's disposition towards selling this asset.

linkedBequestId.description: Reference to a Bequest.id if this asset is also subject to a bequest. A dealer interest and a bequest may conflict.

privacyLevel.$comment: testator_only: only the testator can see this dealer interest. proxy_visible: the testator and authorised proxy can see it. executor_visible: the testator, proxy, and executor can see it. all_parties: visible to all parties with access to the estate data.
privacyLevel.description: Who may see this dealer interest record. Privacy is critical — the testator may not want family to know about dealer approaches.

communicationInitiatedBy.$comment: buyer: the interested party initiated contact. testator: the testator reached out to the interested party. proxy: the proxy initiated contact on behalf of the testator. executor: the executor initiated contact post-death.
communicationInitiatedBy.description: Who initiated the communication about this potential transaction.

managedByProxyId.description: Reference to the ProxyAuthorisation.id that governs this dealer interest — the proxy managing the negotiation.

notes.description: Free-text notes about this dealer interest.
examples: Christie's approached via family friend — informal valuation suggests £120,000-£150,000
Testator does not want this disclosed to the family during their lifetime
